positive: A delicate, seamless repeating pattern of bioluminescent deep-sea flora and fauna, rendered in a soft watercolor style with glowing neon accents. Intricate, ethereal, high detail, perfect for fabric printing, deep indigo and emerald palette, vector illustration.
